news.t: Is SoFi Technologies Ripe for a Leveraged Relief Rally?
Direxion Delivers Four New 2X Bull Single Stock Leveraged ETFs for High Conviction Stock Traders

holdings.infoBox: SOFA is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily SOFI Bull 2X ETF (SOFA) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the SoFi Technologies Inc index. The fund provides 2x leveraged exposure, less fees and expenses, to the daily price movement for shares of SoFi Technologies Inc (TICKER: SOFI). SOFA was launched on Feb 11, 2026 and is issued by Direxion.

data.title: Is SoFi Technologies Ripe for a Leveraged Relief Rally?
data.text: Whether viewed as a buy or sell opportunity, one name in the fintech sector that draws trader attention is SoFi Technologies (SOFI). For traders looking at SoFi's recent price weakness as a buying opp...

data.title: Direxion Delivers Four New 2X Bull Single Stock Leveraged ETFs for High Conviction Stock Traders
data.text: New York, United States, Feb. 24, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- New ETFs Tied to ASML, BABA, MRVL, and SOFI Bring Direxion's Single Stock Leveraged & Inverse Suite to 55 Fund Offerings
